hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '/backend/' && (cd /home/oleh/projects/quiz-game/backend && /home/oleh/go/bin/golangci-lint run 2>&1 | head -50); } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '/frontend/' && (cd /home/oleh/projects/quiz-game/frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | head -50); } 2>/dev/null || true
